title: Functions should avoid having too many lines of code
description: A function that grows too large tends to aggregate too many responsibilities. Such functions inevitably become harder to understand and therefore harder to maintain. Above a specific threshold, it is strongly advised to refactor into smaller functions which focus on well-defined tasks.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Function has too many lines (15+). Consider breaking it into smaller, more focused functions.
Function is extremely long (25+ lines). This function should be refactored immediately.
Function is both long and complex with multiple control structures. Consider refactoring.
